name: LegalForensics
description:
Know where you're exposed before you sign. Decision-first contract review that works directly inside Claude — no software to install, no files to upload to a third-party app.

Works on any business contract: NDAs, MSAs, SOWs, employment, lease, consulting, service, distribution, franchise, partnership, and foundry/semiconductor agreements.

--- HOW TO USE ---

1. UPLOAD YOUR CONTRACT
   Use upload_contract with either:
   - A Google Doc share link (file_url)
   - A public PDF or DOCX URL (file_url)
   - Pasted contract text (text_content)
   You'll get back a contract_id. Each upload costs 1 credit.

2. ANALYZE THE CONTRACT
   With your contract_id, use any combination of:
   - get_risk_analysis — Full risk breakdown: top risks ranked by severity, exposure drivers, favorable terms, structural assessment, and next steps. Add perspective= (e.g. buyer, seller, employer, disclosing party) to frame analysis from your side.
   - get_verdict — Clear sign / negotiate / walk away decision with reasoning, priority renegotiation asks, and top 3 actions.
   - explain_contract — Plain-English walkthrough: what the contract does, who holds the risk, and what a CEO needs to know before signing.

3. ANALYZE A SPECIFIC CLAUSE (no upload needed)
   Use explain_clause with any pasted clause text for instant plain-English explanation and risk assessment. Free — no credit required.

4. CHECK YOUR BALANCE
   Use check_credits to see credits remaining and get a purchase link if you need more.

--- CREDITS & PLANS ---

- Each contract upload costs 1 credit
- explain_clause is free (no credit required)
- New accounts receive 1 free credit on signup
- Purchase additional credits at app.legalforensics.ai/plugin
- Subscription plan: unlimited uploads + additional tools (playbook review and more) available at app.legalforensics.ai — visit the site for current pricing and plan details.

--- PERSPECTIVES ---

All analysis tools accept an optional perspective= parameter to frame results from your role in the contract. Common roles: buyer, seller, employer, employee, landlord, tenant, licensor, licensee, disclosing party, receiving party, foundry, fabless, lender, borrower, and more.

Learn more at legalforensics.ai
author: LegalForensics.AI

auth.instructions: Sign up at app.legalforensics.ai/plugin — your API key will be shown immediately after signup. Paste it here to connect. You'll receive 1 free credit to get started.

tools.name: upload_contract
tools.description: Upload a contract via Google Doc link, public PDF/DOCX URL, or pasted text. Returns a contract_id for analysis. Costs 1 credit per upload.

tools.name: get_risk_analysis
tools.description: Full AI risk analysis: risk posture, top risks ranked by severity, exposure drivers, favorable terms, structural assessment, and recommended next steps. Supports perspective framing (buyer, seller, employer, etc.).

tools.name: get_verdict
tools.description: Decision brief: sign, negotiate, or walk away — with reasoning, priority renegotiation asks, and top 3 actions. Supports perspective framing.

tools.name: explain_contract
tools.description: Plain-English narrative walkthrough of the contract: what it does, who holds the risk, and what a non-lawyer needs to understand before signing.

tools.name: explain_clause
tools.description: Paste any clause text for instant plain-English explanation and risk assessment. No contract upload needed. Free — no credit required.

tools.name: list_contracts
tools.description: List all contracts in your LegalForensics account, optionally filtered by keyword.

tools.name: check_credits
tools.description: Check your credit balance. Returns credits remaining, credits used, and a Stripe purchase link if balance is zero.
